headline: Deutsche Bank Upgrades Comcast (CMCSA) to Buy. Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.55%, Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is included among the 14 Best Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) delivers industry-leading broadband, mobile, and entertainment platforms that power incredible experiences for customers globally.
